name: 四圣传说之黑暗森林
short_description: This is a plot-based game. The story of the game is original for the individual. There are only some simple mazes in the game, and there are no monsters in the maze. Characters can not be upgraded by conventional means, only some HP can be added through props. There are only a few BOSS battles throughout the game.
detailed_description:
This is a plot-based game. The story of the game is original for the individual. There are only some simple mazes in the game, and there are no monsters in the maze. Characters can not be upgraded by conventional means, only some HP can be added through props. There are only a few BOSS battles throughout the game. The total length of the game is about several hours.

email:2995391767@qq.com
